title: Update to my automated trading bot
author: Spiritual-Force-6891
selftext:
Disclaimer: i do not sell anything.

Hi all,
I wanted to share my progress into my project, which is creating a fully automated trading bot.
the pictures above are from a test of a 1 month period. (Capital returns of 28% a month)

I am invested in this projected, obviously to create a passive income for me, and everyone else invested.
This update includes a patch for the execution engine, the bot now enters, and exits trade fully automated, with the results shown.
The bot is still not finished yet and we are still working hard to get this done.
There are still some flaws, like missing fail-safes which are essential for capital preserving. Which is my number 1 priority.
Also some take profit mechanisms are missing and some execution logics are a little bit off. 

I have a server in where i share many more details.
Also i share other subjects, like my whole strategy this bot is based off. 
All for free of course.

What do you guys think? 
Please be as honest as possible

comments.author: FairFlowAI
comments.body:
looks like you are on the right track 🍀 congrats for achieving this milestone! 

tell me more. is there anything particular you are looking for help with?

replies.author: Spiritual-Force-6891
replies.body:
Thank you! I've got the feeling i am indeed on the right track!
Actually no, at the moment i do not need any help, i am already invested in this project within an cooperation.
But ofcourse, any feedback is ALWAYS welcome.
If you'd like to see more of whatever i am making and planning, i suggest you to join my server.

comments.author: delivite
comments.body: Looks good. Tick resolution, right? I would say not enough data but you understand your bot better so you know best. I trade with bots on cTrader as well. Feel free to reach out. I’m happy to support if I can.

replies.author: Spiritual-Force-6891
replies.body:
Yeah, tick resolutiom indeed.
Thank you for your kind words.
I would absolutely appreciate it if you could join my server, and share your feedback there.
Also i'd give you an extern developer role for us to maybe cooperate in future porjects?

comments.author: DingleBaerry
comments.body: Send me the link. I’ll check it out.

comments.author: rayanpal_
comments.body: I’m building something similar to this with a friend today! Would love to test it out if you had a link and contribute to any code!!

replies.author: Spiritual-Force-6891
replies.body:
Hey bud,
I wish you all the good luck with your own product.
Unfortunely, i am very discrete with my own project, and will not share my code, obviously to protect my integrity.
What i can do, is invite you to my server, in which i share many details regarding strategy / updates / performance, and some other things.

comments.author: TFinancialMillennial
comments.body: Where do you start in terms of making/starting an auto trading bot to trade for you? Does it execute through IBKR?

replies.author: Spiritual-Force-6891
replies.body:
I do not know what IBKR is actually.
The bot is being coded and executed on Ctrader platform entirely.
It's a very user friendly platform, which allow users to create bots, test and analyse them, and actually run them on it.

comments.author: dice1976
comments.body: I would love to see this. Send link or info please.  Tyvm

comments.author: Candid_Reality71
comments.body: Win rate bro, try on bigger data maybe an year or so

replies.author: Spiritual-Force-6891
replies.body:
Yes, for sure!
This was just meant as an preview, and show the bot's execution analysis and execution module are working. And simply just needs some patches and adjustments.
More of like a preview.
Whenever the bot's working, i will deeply test all aspects of the bot before letting it run.

replies.author: Candid_Reality71
replies.body: Awesome man, let me know how it turns out. Excited for you 🤩

replies.author: Spiritual-Force-6891
replies.body:
Thank you for your kind words! 
I am also very excited myself how it'll turn out.
If you'd like to stay updated, or see many more details of what i am doing and/or how it'll turn out. I gladly invite you to my server if you'd like.

replies.author: Candid_Reality71
replies.body:
Yeah man, lets go

To the moonnn

comments.author: GeneralCaptionOP
comments.body: I am also starting to make something like this, can you share the link ☺️

replies.author: Spiritual-Force-6891
replies.body:
Sure bud, i'll send it to you privately.
In my server you can ask any qeustions you want.

comments.author: No-Republic6926
comments.body: Bro can you send the link
